inputs.name: content_topics
inputs.description: Core topics your content covers, one per line

inputs.name: publishing_frequency
inputs.description: How often you publish new content

content-calendar.description: Weekly content plan based on keyword gaps, trending topics, and audience needs

activities.intent: Identify keyword gaps and trending topics relevant to the user's niche
steps: Review existing content inventory and keyword coverage
Identify keyword gaps where competitors rank but user does not
Check trending topics in the user's industry
Cross-reference with product-marketing-context for relevance

activities.intent: Create a prioritized weekly content calendar with topics, formats, and goals
steps: Prioritize topics by business impact and ranking difficulty
Assign content format to each topic (blog, social, email, ad)
Define the goal for each piece (rank, nurture, convert, authority)
Produce the weekly calendar with deadlines and owners

draft-review.description: Review drafted content for SEO, readability, brand voice, and E-E-A-T signals

activities.intent: Evaluate the draft against SEO, readability, brand voice, and E-E-A-T criteria
steps: Check target keyword placement in title, H1, first paragraph, and meta description
Evaluate readability: sentence length, paragraph length, passive voice, jargon
Verify brand voice consistency against product-marketing-context
Assess E-E-A-T signals: first-hand experience, specific data, credible sources, author expertise
Check internal and external linking opportunities
Produce a scored review with specific, actionable fixes

repurpose.description: Take one piece of content and transform it into blog post, social threads, email, and ad copy

activities.intent: Identify the core insights and key messages from the source content
steps: Read the source content and identify the core thesis
Extract 3-5 key insights that stand alone
Identify the strongest data points, quotes, and examples
Map each insight to the best distribution format

activities.intent: Create platform-specific content variants from the extracted insights
steps: Write a blog post optimized for the target keyword
Create social media threads (Twitter/LinkedIn) from key insights
Draft an email version for newsletter or nurture sequence
Write ad copy variants (headline + body) for paid promotion
Ensure all variants maintain consistent brand voice

performance-review.description: Monthly analysis of content performance with top/bottom performers and recommendations

activities.intent: Review content metrics and identify top and bottom performers
steps: Gather traffic, engagement, and conversion data for all published content
Rank content by business impact (conversions, revenue influence)
Identify top 5 performers and analyze why they work
Identify bottom 5 performers and diagnose issues
Check for content decay: pieces losing rankings or traffic month-over-month
Produce a monthly report with specific recommendations: update, consolidate, retire, or expand
